cells.rationale: Well-specified contract-shaped work (new typed verbs, wire envelope, server-side hash-parity idempotency with a prescribed shared derivation helper) routes GPT-first at the contract-touching xhigh band rather than opus.

Agent-spec authoring with delicate two-mode discrimination, depth-band self-read wording, and a silent-degrade coupling between template and skill needs Claude-tuned prompt judgment and in-repo idiom at the high band.

Rewriting the orchestrator audit gate to switch purely on typed envelopes, with crash-resume semantics and ref-based block reasons, is judgment-heavy skill authoring tightly coupled to the worker/verb contracts, favoring sonnet at high.

An advisory fail-open PreToolUse guard closely copying the commit-guard deny-dispatcher pattern is well-specified pattern-following (explicitly not a security boundary), fitting a GPT tier at high for the path/Bash-vector and blast-radius care.
Doc alignment plus an ADR under this repo's terse prune-in-place, forward-facing, glossary-genre discipline is wording-and-idiom-sensitive taste work best served by sonnet at the bounded medium band.
